name: unslop
description: Strip AI-generated voice from source files without changing behavior. Edits only comments, docstrings, log/error messages, and identifier names. Kills marketing words, AI tells, em-dashes, first-person plural, hedging, tutorial voice, apologetic openers, restatement comments, and unjustified linter-suppression markers. Renames AI-jargon functions with substring-safety verification. 17-rule (Rule 0 through Rule 16), 19-language, 24-framework ruleset. Rule 0 hard floor refuses behavior-change requests mid-pass.
